name: All Cash Advance
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans and online personal loans with same-day funding at physical store locations throughout the Detroit metro area.
description_long:
Advance America is an established payday lender operating multiple physical store locations across Michigan, with a primary presence in the Dearborn area. The company has been serving customers seeking short-term cash solutions for emergency financial needs. Their service model combines in-store and online application options to accommodate different customer preferences and urgency levels.

Advance America specializes in payday loans and personal loans designed for quick access to cash. Customers can apply online or visit one of their physical locations, receive an instant approval decision, and walk out with funds the same day if approved. The company also offers Western Union services at their locations. Their loan products are marketed as solutions for customers facing temporary cash flow challenges or emergency expenses.

The company emphasizes fast processing and convenience as key differentiators. They highlight an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and claim over 100,000 five-star Google reviews. Their store locations provide in-person service with extended hours (10 AM–6 PM most days, 9 AM–6 PM Friday, 10 AM–2 PM Saturday). Multiple locations throughout the Detroit metro area reduce travel burden for customers seeking physical access.

As a payday lender, Advance America operates in a high-cost lending category with significant regulatory scrutiny. While they emphasize speed and accessibility, payday loans typically carry APRs exceeding 400%, creating a debt cycle risk for borrowers. The website provides no information about loan terms, fees, or cost disclosures—critical information consumers need before borrowing. This lack of transparency about actual costs is a major limitation for informed decision-making.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available: Approved customers can walk out with cash immediately
Multiple locations in Detroit metro area (10 locations within 9 miles of Dearborn)
Online and in-store application options for customer convenience
Extended hours including Friday evening (until 6 PM) and Saturday morning service
Fast approval decision process with instant determination stated on website
A+ Better Business Bureau rating claimed on their website
Western Union services available at physical locations for money transfer needs
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website—APR, fees, and loan terms completely absent from content
Payday loan model inherently carries very high interest rates (typically 400%+ APR) creating debt cycle risk
Physical store requirement for same-day funding limits accessibility for homebound or rural customers
Website lacks transparent disclosure of total cost of borrowing or comparison tools
No mention of alternative repayment plans, hardship options, or debt management resources
best_for: Employed workers with predictable paychecks facing true one-time emergencies
Borrowers within driving distance of a Dearborn-area Advance America location who need same-day cash
Customers who prefer in-person service and immediate cash access over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed borrowers in the Detroit metro area who need immediate cash and have access to a physical store location. The critical caveat is that payday loans are extremely expensive borrowing products (typically 400%+ APR) that should only be used for genuine emergencies, with a clear plan to repay in full on the next paycheck—not as an ongoing credit solution.
services: Store locator tool with maps and directions
Physical store locations with extended business hours
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
